mnemonics: A Mother In Cows Really Always Pick Lunch
Aces Make Incredible Connections Really Always Produce Linkage
keyPoints: Adjacency Matrix: Represents graph as a matrix where entry [i][j] = 1 if there is an edge between vertices i and j, 0 otherwise.
Incidence Matrix: Represents graph as a matrix where entry [i][j] = 1 if vertex i is incident to edge j, 0 otherwise.
Circuit Matrix: Represents graph as a matrix where entry [i][j] = 1 if vertices i and j are in the same circuit, 0 otherwise.
Path Matrix: Represents graph as a matrix where entry [i][j] = 1 if there is a path from vertex i to vertex j, 0 otherwise.
